```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import argparse
import sys
from pymilvus import (
    connections,
    db,
    MilvusClient,
    FieldSchema,
    CollectionSchema,
    Collection,
    DataType,
    utility,
    Function,
    FunctionType,
)

def build_schema_with_modality(dim: int, is_single_modality: bool=True, has_sparse_vector: bool=True) -> CollectionSchema:
    """
    统一多模态 Schema:
        - id: INT64, primary, chunk id sha256
        - doc_id: 业务 doc id
        - chunk_idx: chunk id
        - modality: 'text' / 'image' / 'both'
        - text: 原始文本
        - image_url: 图片路径/URL
        - image_wh: [w, h]
        - time_stamp: 插入时间戳 (ms)
        - meta_info: 其他 JSON / 字符串化元信息
        - text_embedding: 文本向量
        - image_embedding: 图片向量
        - mm_embedding: 单模态向量
    """
    fields = [
        FieldSchema(
            name="id",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=200,
            is_primary=True,
            auto_id=False,
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="doc_id",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=200,
            description="doc id / group id",
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="chunk_idx",
            dtype=DataType.INT16,
            description="chunk id index when need chunk document",
            is_nullable=True
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="modality",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=20,
            description="support: text / image / both",
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="text",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=65535,
            description="Original text content",
            enable_analyzer=True,
            is_nullable=True
        ),
        # text BM25 sparse vector
        FieldSchema(
            name="text_sparse_vector",
            dtype=DataType.SPARSE_FLOAT_VECTOR,
        ),        
        FieldSchema(
            name="image_url",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=512,
            description="Image URL or path",
        ),
        # Milvus 2.6 的数组字段：使用 ARRAY + element_type + max_capacity
        FieldSchema(
            name="image_wh",
            dtype=DataType.ARRAY,
            element_type=DataType.INT32,
            max_capacity=2,
            description="[width, height]",
            is_nullable=True
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="time_stamp",
            dtype=DataType.TIMESTAMPTZ,
            description="Event time in ms",
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="meta_info",
            dtype=DataType.JSON,
            max_length=2048,
            description="Extra metadata (JSON string)",
            is_nullable=True
        ),
    ]
    if is_single_modality:
        fields.append(
            FieldSchema(
                name="mm_embedding",
                dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR,
                dim=dim,
                description="embedding vector",
                is_nullable=True
            )
        )
    else:
        fields.append(
            FieldSchema(
                name="text_embedding",
                dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR,
                dim=dim,
                description="Text embedding vector",
                is_nullable=True
            )
        )
        fields.append(
            FieldSchema(
                name="image_embedding",
                dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR,
                dim=dim,
                description="Image embedding vector",
                is_nullable=True
            )
        )
    schema = CollectionSchema(
        fields=fields,
        enable_dynamic_field=True,
        description="Unified multimodal retrieval collection (text/image/text+image)",
    )
    if has_sparse_vector:
        bm25_func = Function(
            name="text_bm25",
            function_type=FunctionType.BM25,
            input_field_names=["text"],
            output_field_names=["text_sparse_vector"],
        )
        schema.add_function(bm25_func)
    return schema

def connect_milvus(host: str, port: str):
    print(f"[INFO] Connecting Milvus: {host}:{port}")
    connections.connect(
        alias="default",
        host=host,
        port=port,
    )

def ensure_database(db_name: str):
    db_list = db.list_database()
    if db_name not in db_list:
        print(f"[INFO] Database '{db_name}' not found, creating...")
        db.create_database(db_name)
    else:
        print(f"[INFO] Database '{db_name}' already exists.")
    db.using_database(db_name)

def drop_collection_if_needed(collection_name: str, overwrite: bool=False):
    colls = utility.list_collections()
    if collection_name in colls:
        if overwrite:
            print(f"[WARN] Collection '{collection_name}' already exists, dropping...")
            utility.drop_collection(collection_name)
        else:
            print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' already exists, skip creation.")
            return False
    return True

def create_collection(db_name: str,
                      collection_name: str,
                      schema: CollectionSchema) -> Collection:
    print(f"[INFO] Using database: {db_name}")
    db.using_database(db_name)
    print(f"[INFO] Creating collection: {collection_name}")
    coll = Collection(
        name=collection_name,
        schema=schema,
        shards_num=2,
    )
    return coll

def create_indexes(coll: Collection,
                   metric_type: str,
                   index_type: str='HNSW',
                   is_single_modality: bool=True,
                   has_sparse_vector: bool=True
                   ):
    """
    为 text_embedding / image_embedding 创建索引。
    这里给一个通用配置，你可以按需调参。
    """
    # -------- dense index params --------
    if index_type.upper() == "HNSW":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "HNSW",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"M": 16, "efConstruction": 200},
        }
    elif index_type.upper() == "IVF_PQ":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "IVF_PQ",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"nlist": 2048, "m": 16, "nbits": 8},
        }
    elif index_type.upper() == "IVF_FLAT":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "IVF_FLAT",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"nlist": 2048},
        }
    else:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported index_type: {index_type}")
    print(f"[INFO] Creating dense_index_params: {dense_index_params}")
    if is_single_modality:
        pass
        coll.create_index(
            field_name="mm_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Creating index for field 'mm_embedding': {dense_index_params}")
    else:
        coll.create_index(
            field_name="text_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Creating index for field 'text_embedding': {dense_index_params}")

        coll.create_index(
            field_name="image_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Creating index for field 'image_embedding': {dense_index_params}")
    # -------- sparse (BM25) index params --------
    if has_sparse_vector:
        sparse_index_params = {
            "index_type": "SPARSE_INVERTED_INDEX",
            "metric_type": "BM25",
            "params": {"inverted_index_algo": "DAAT_MAXSCORE"},
        }
        print(f"[INFO] Creating sparse index on 'text_sparse_vector': {sparse_index_params}")
        coll.create_index("text_sparse_vector", sparse_index_params, index_name="idx_text_sparse_vector")
        print(f"[INFO] Creating sparse for field 'text_sparse_vector': metric_type=BM25, inverted_index_algo: DAAT_MAXSCORE")

def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Create multimodal collection in Milvus 2.6")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default="127.0.0.1", help="Milvus host")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=str, default="19530", help="Milvus port")
    parser.add_argument("--db_name", type=str, default="multimodal_db", help="Database name")
    parser.add_argument("--collection_name", type=str, default="multimodal_retrieval", help="Collection name")
    parser.add_argument("--is_single_modality", type=bool, default=True)
    parser.add_argument("--has_sparse_vector", type=bool, default=True, help="need sparse search")
    parser.add_argument("--dim", type=int, default=2048, help="embedding dimension")
    parser.add_argument("--metric_type", type=str, default="IP", choices=["IP", "L2", "COSINE"],
                        help="Metric type for ANN index")
    parser.add_argument("--index_type", type=str, default="HNSW", help="Index type for embedding")
    parser.add_argument("--overwrite", action="store_true",
                        help="Danger!!! Drop collection if exists and recreate")
    return parser.parse_args()

def main():
    args = parse_args()
    connect_milvus(args.host, args.port)
    ensure_database(args.db_name)
    if not drop_collection_if_needed(args.collection_name, args.overwrite):
        print("[DONE] Collection already exists, use --overwrite to recreate.")
        return
    schema = build_schema_with_modality(args.dim, args.is_single_modality, args.has_sparse_vector)
    coll = create_collection(args.db_name, args.collection_name, schema)
    create_indexes(
        coll=coll,
        metric_type=args.metric_type,
        index_type=args.index_type,
        is_single_modality=args.is_single_modality,
        has_sparse_vector=args.has_sparse_vector
    )
    # 可选：预加载
    coll.load()
    print(f"[DONE] Collection '{args.collection_name}' created and loaded in database '{args.db_name}'.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())
```

# 读取Parquet并写入Milvus的完整脚本

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import argparse
import hashlib
import time
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Dict, Any
import daft
from pymilvus import connections, db, Collection
from tqdm import tqdm

def connect_milvus(host: str, port: str, db_name: str):
    """连接Milvus并切换到指定数据库"""
    print(f"[INFO] Connecting to Milvus: {host}:{port}")
    connections.connect(alias="default", host=host, port=port)
    print(f"[INFO] Using database: {db_name}")
    db.using_database(db_name)

def generate_id(path: str) -> str:
    """根据path生成唯一ID"""
    return hashlib.sha256(path.encode()).hexdigest()[:64]

def extract_doc_id(path: str) -> str:
    """从path提取doc_id（可根据实际情况调整）"""
    # 例如：从s3路径中提取文件名（不含扩展名）
    filename = path.split('/')[-1]
    doc_id = filename.rsplit('.', 1)[0] if '.' in filename else filename
    return doc_id[:200]  # 限制长度

def prepare_batch_data(df: daft.DataFrame, batch_size: int = 1000):
    """
    将daft DataFrame转换为Milvus插入格式
    
    Args:
        df: daft DataFrame
        batch_size: 批次大小
    """
    # 转换为pandas进行处理
    pdf = df.to_pandas()
    
    total_rows = len(pdf)
    print(f"[INFO] Total rows to insert: {total_rows}")
    
    for start_idx in range(0, total_rows, batch_size):
        end_idx = min(start_idx + batch_size, total_rows)
        batch_pdf = pdf.iloc[start_idx:end_idx]
        
        batch_data = {
            "id": [],
            "doc_id": [],
            "chunk_idx": [],
            "modality": [],
            "text": [],
            "image_url": [],
            "image_wh": [],
            "time_stamp": [],
            "meta_info": [],
            "mm_embedding": []
        }
        
        current_time = int(time.time() * 1000)  # 毫秒时间戳
        
        for _, row in batch_pdf.iterrows():
            path = row['path']
            embedding = row['mm_embedding']
            
            # 必填字段
            batch_data["id"].append(generate_id(path))
            batch_data["doc_id"].append(extract_doc_id(path))
            batch_data["chunk_idx"].append(0)  # 图片一般不分chunk
            batch_data["modality"].append("image")
            batch_data["text"].append("")  # 图片模态，text为空
            batch_data["image_url"].append(path)
            batch_data["image_wh"].append(None)  # 如果没有宽高信息，设为None
            batch_data["time_stamp"].append(current_time)
            batch_data["meta_info"].append({"source": "parquet_import"})
            batch_data["mm_embedding"].append(embedding)
        
        yield batch_data, start_idx, end_idx

def insert_data_to_milvus(
    collection_name: str,
    parquet_path: str,
    batch_size: int = 1000
):
    """
    从parquet文件读取数据并插入Milvus
    
    Args:
        collection_name: Milvus集合名称
        parquet_path: parquet文件路径
        batch_size: 批量插入大小
    """
    # 读取parquet文件
    print(f"[INFO] Reading parquet file: {parquet_path}")
    df = daft.read_parquet(parquet_path)
    
    # 显示schema
    print("[INFO] Parquet schema:")
    df.show(1)
    
    # 获取Collection
    print(f"[INFO] Loading collection: {collection_name}")
    collection = Collection(collection_name)
    
    # 批量插入数据
    total_inserted = 0
    
    for batch_data, start_idx, end_idx in prepare_batch_data(df, batch_size):
        try:
            # 插入数据
            collection.insert(batch_data)
            total_inserted += (end_idx - start_idx)
            print(f"[INFO] Inserted batch {start_idx}-{end_idx}, total: {total_inserted}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[ERROR] Failed to insert batch {start_idx}-{end_idx}: {e}")
            raise
    
    # 刷新以确保数据持久化
    print("[INFO] Flushing collection...")
    collection.flush()
    
    print(f"[DONE] Successfully inserted {total_inserted} records into '{collection_name}'")
    
    # 显示集合统计
    collection.load()
    print(f"[INFO] Collection entity count: {collection.num_entities}")

def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Insert parquet data into Milvus")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default="127.0.0.1", help="Milvus host")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=str, default="19530", help="Milvus port")
    parser.add_argument("--db_name", type=str, default="multimodal_db", help="Database name")
    parser.add_argument("--collection_name", type=str, default="multimodal_retrieval", 
                        help="Collection name")
    parser.add_argument("--parquet_path", type=str, required=True, 
                        help="Path to parquet file")
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=1000, 
                        help="Batch size for insertion")
    return parser.parse_args()

def main():
    args = parse_args()
    
    # 连接Milvus
    connect_milvus(args.host, args.port, args.db_name)
    
    # 插入数据
    insert_data_to_milvus(
        collection_name=args.collection_name,
        parquet_path=args.parquet_path,
        batch_size=args.batch_size
    )

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

## 使用方法

### 1. 基本用法

```bash
python insert_parquet_to_milvus.py \
    --parquet_path /path/to/your/data.parquet \
    --collection_name multimodal_retrieval \
    --db_name multimodal_db \
    --batch_size 1000
```

### 2. 如果需要自定义字段映射

如果你的parquet文件还包含其他字段，可以修改`prepare_batch_data`函数：

```python
def prepare_batch_data(df: daft.DataFrame, batch_size: int = 1000):
    pdf = df.to_pandas()
    total_rows = len(pdf)
    
    for start_idx in range(0, total_rows, batch_size):
        end_idx = min(start_idx + batch_size, total_rows)
        batch_pdf = pdf.iloc[start_idx:end_idx]
        
        batch_data = {
            "id": [],
            "doc_id": [],
            "chunk_idx": [],
            "modality": [],
            "text": [],
            "image_url": [],
            "image_wh": [],
            "time_stamp": [],
            "meta_info": [],
            "mm_embedding": []
        }
        
        current_time = int(time.time() * 1000)
        
        for _, row in batch_pdf.iterrows():
            path = row['path']
            embedding = row['mm_embedding']
            
            # 如果parquet中有width和height字段
            width = row.get('width', None)
            height = row.get('height', None)
            image_wh = [width, height] if width and height else None
            
            batch_data["id"].append(generate_id(path))
            batch_data["doc_id"].append(extract_doc_id(path))
            batch_data["chunk_idx"].append(0)
            batch_data["modality"].append("image")
            batch_data["text"].append("")
            batch_data["image_url"].append(path)
            batch_data["image_wh"].append(image_wh)
            batch_data["time_stamp"].append(current_time)
            batch_data["meta_info"].append({"source": "parquet", "original_path": path})
            batch_data["mm_embedding"].append(embedding)
        
        yield batch_data, start_idx, end_idx
```

### 4. 处理大文件（流式处理）

如果文件很大，可以使用daft的流式处理：

```python
def insert_data_streaming(collection_name: str, parquet_path: str, batch_size: int = 1000):
    """流式处理大文件"""
    print(f"[INFO] Reading parquet file in streaming mode: {parquet_path}")
    
    # daft支持lazy evaluation
    df = daft.read_parquet(parquet_path)
    
    collection = Collection(collection_name)
    total_inserted = 0
    
    # 分批处理
    for batch_data, start_idx, end_idx in prepare_batch_data(df, batch_size):
        collection.insert(batch_data)
        total_inserted += (end_idx - start_idx)
        
        # 每10批flush一次
        if (end_idx // batch_size) % 10 == 0:
            collection.flush()
            print(f"[INFO] Progress: {total_inserted} records inserted")
    
    collection.flush()
    print(f"[DONE] Total {total_inserted} records inserted")
```

## 注意事项

1. **text_sparse_vector字段**：这个字段由BM25 Function自动生成，不需要在插入数据时提供。如果没有text内容，可以传空字符串。

2. **nullable字段**：`chunk_idx`, `text`, `image_wh`, `meta_info`都设置了nullable，可以传None。

3. **时间戳**：`time_stamp`使用毫秒级时间戳。

4. **ID生成**：使用path的SHA256哈希作为唯一ID，确保同一文件不会重复插入。

5. **批量大小**：根据embedding维度和内存大小调整batch_size，推荐500-2000。

```python
    """连接Milvus并切换到指定数据库"""
    print(f"[INFO] Connecting to Milvus: {host}:{port}")
    connections.connect(alias="default", host=host, port=port)
    
    # 确保数据库存在
    db_list = db.list_database()
    if db_name not in db_list:
        print(f"[INFO] Database '{db_name}' not found, creating...")
        db.create_database(db_name)
    
    print(f"[INFO] Using database: {db_name}")
    db.using_database(db_name)

def build_schema_with_modality(dim: int, is_single_modality: bool=True, has_sparse_vector: bool=True) -> CollectionSchema:
    """构建Schema（与create_collection.py保持一致）"""
    fields = [
        FieldSchema(
            name="id",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=200,
            is_primary=True,
            auto_id=False,
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="doc_id",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=200,
            description="doc id / group id",
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="chunk_idx",
            dtype=DataType.INT16,
            description="chunk id index when need chunk document",
            is_nullable=True
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="modality",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=20,
            description="support: text / image / both",
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="text",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=65535,
            description="Original text content",
            enable_analyzer=True,
            is_nullable=True
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="text_sparse_vector",
            dtype=DataType.SPARSE_FLOAT_VECTOR,
        ),        
        FieldSchema(
            name="image_url",
            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,
            max_length=512,
            description="Image URL or path",
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="image_wh",
            dtype=DataType.ARRAY,
            element_type=DataType.INT32,
            max_capacity=2,
            description="[width, height]",
            is_nullable=True
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="time_stamp",
            dtype=DataType.TIMESTAMPTZ,
            description="Event time in ms",
        ),
        FieldSchema(
            name="meta_info",
            dtype=DataType.JSON,
            max_length=2048,
            description="Extra metadata (JSON string)",
            is_nullable=True
        ),
    ]
    
    if is_single_modality:
        fields.append(
            FieldSchema(
                name="mm_embedding",
                dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR,
                dim=dim,
                description="embedding vector",
                is_nullable=True
            )
        )
    else:
        fields.append(
            FieldSchema(
                name="text_embedding",
                dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR,
                dim=dim,
                description="Text embedding vector",
                is_nullable=True
            )
        )
        fields.append(
            FieldSchema(
                name="image_embedding",
                dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR,
                dim=dim,
                description="Image embedding vector",
                is_nullable=True
            )
        )
    
    schema = CollectionSchema(
        fields=fields,
        enable_dynamic_field=True,
        description="Unified multimodal retrieval collection (text/image/text+image)",
    )
    
    if has_sparse_vector:
        bm25_func = Function(
            name="text_bm25",
            function_type=FunctionType.BM25,
            input_field_names=["text"],
            output_field_names=["text_sparse_vector"],
        )
        schema.add_function(bm25_func)
    
    return schema

def ensure_collection(
    collection_name: str,
    dim: int = 2048,
    is_single_modality: bool = True,
    has_sparse_vector: bool = True,
    metric_type: str = "IP",
    index_type: str = "HNSW",
) -> Collection:
    """
    确保Collection存在，如果不存在则创建
    """
    # 检查Collection是否存在
    if utility.has_collection(collection_name):
        print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' already exists, loading...")
        collection = Collection(collection_name)
        collection.load()
        return collection
    
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' not found, creating...")
    
    # 创建Schema
    schema = build_schema_with_modality(dim, is_single_modality, has_sparse_vector)
    
    # 创建Collection
    collection = Collection(
        name=collection_name,
        schema=schema,
        shards_num=2,
    )
    
    # 创建索引
    print("[INFO] Creating indexes...")
    
    # Dense vector index
    if index_type.upper() == "HNSW":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "HNSW",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"M": 16, "efConstruction": 200},
        }
    elif index_type.upper() == "IVF_FLAT":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "IVF_FLAT",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"nlist": 2048},
        }
    else:
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "HNSW",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"M": 16, "efConstruction": 200},
        }
    
    if is_single_modality:
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="mm_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Created index for 'mm_embedding'")
    else:
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="text_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="image_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Created indexes for text/image embeddings")
    
    # Sparse vector index
    if has_sparse_vector:
        sparse_index_params = {
            "index_type": "SPARSE_INVERTED_INDEX",
            "metric_type": "BM25",
            "params": {"inverted_index_algo": "DAAT_MAXSCORE"},
        }
        collection.create_index("text_sparse_vector", sparse_index_params)
        print(f"[INFO] Created sparse index for 'text_sparse_vector'")
    
    # 加载Collection
    collection.load()
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' created and loaded successfully")
    
    return collection

def generate_id(path: str) -> str:
    """根据path生成唯一ID"""
    return hashlib.sha256(path.encode()).hexdigest()[:64]

def extract_doc_id(path: str) -> str:
    """从path提取doc_id"""
    filename = path.split('/')[-1]
    doc_id = filename.rsplit('.', 1)[0] if '.' in filename else filename
    return doc_id[:200]

def prepare_batch_data(df: daft.DataFrame, batch_size: int = 1000):
    """将daft DataFrame转换为Milvus插入格式"""
    # 转换为pandas进行处理
    pdf = df.to_pandas()
    
    total_rows = len(pdf)
    print(f"[INFO] Total rows to insert: {total_rows}")
    
    for start_idx in range(0, total_rows, batch_size):
        end_idx = min(start_idx + batch_size, total_rows)
        batch_pdf = pdf.iloc[start_idx:end_idx]
        
        batch_data = {
            "id": [],
            "doc_id": [],
            "chunk_idx": [],
            "modality": [],
            "text": [],
            "image_url": [],
            "image_wh": [],
            "time_stamp": [],
            "meta_info": [],
            "mm_embedding": []
        }
        
        current_time = int(time.time() * 1000)
        
        for _, row in batch_pdf.iterrows():
            path = row['path']
            embedding = row['mm_embedding']
            
            batch_data["id"].append(generate_id(path))
            batch_data["doc_id"].append(extract_doc_id(path))
            batch_data["chunk_idx"].append(0)
            batch_data["modality"].append("image")
            batch_data["text"].append("")
            batch_data["image_url"].append(path)
            batch_data["image_wh"].append(None)
            batch_data["time_stamp"].append(current_time)
            batch_data["meta_info"].append({"source": "parquet_import", "original_path": path})
            batch_data["mm_embedding"].append(embedding)
        
        yield batch_data, start_idx, end_idx

def insert_data_to_milvus(
    collection: Collection,
    parquet_path: str,
    batch_size: int = 1000
):
    """从parquet文件读取数据并插入Milvus"""
    print(f"[INFO] Reading parquet file: {parquet_path}")
    df = daft.read_parquet(parquet_path)
    
    print("[INFO] Parquet schema:")
    df.show(1)
    
    total_inserted = 0
    
    for batch_data, start_idx, end_idx in prepare_batch_data(df, batch_size):
        try:
            collection.insert(batch_data)
            total_inserted += (end_idx - start_idx)
            print(f"[INFO] Inserted batch {start_idx}-{end_idx}, total: {total_inserted}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[ERROR] Failed to insert batch {start_idx}-{end_idx}: {e}")
            raise
    
    print("[INFO] Flushing collection...")
    collection.flush()
    
    print(f"[DONE] Successfully inserted {total_inserted} records")
    print(f"[INFO] Collection entity count: {collection.num_entities}")

def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Insert parquet data into Milvus")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default="127.0.0.1", help="Milvus host")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=str, default="19530", help="Milvus port")
    parser.add_argument("--db_name", type=str, default="multimodal_db", help="Database name")
    parser.add_argument("--collection_name", type=str, required=True, help="Collection name")
    parser.add_argument("--parquet_path", type=str, required=True, help="Path to parquet file")
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=1000, help="Batch size for insertion")
    
    # Collection创建参数（如果Collection不存在）
    parser.add_argument("--dim", type=int, default=2048, help="Embedding dimension")
    parser.add_argument("--is_single_modality", type=bool, default=True, 
                        help="Use single modality schema")
    parser.add_argument("--has_sparse_vector", type=bool, default=True, 
                        help="Enable BM25 sparse vector")
    parser.add_argument("--metric_type", type=str, default="IP", 
                        choices=["IP", "L2", "COSINE"], help="Metric type for ANN index")
    parser.add_argument("--index_type", type=str, default="HNSW", 
                        help="Index type (HNSW/IVF_FLAT)")
    
    return parser.parse_args()

def main():
    args = parse_args()
    
    # 连接Milvus
    connect_milvus(args.host, args.port, args.db_name)
    
    # 确保Collection存在（不存在则创建）
    collection = ensure_collection(
        collection_name=args.collection_name,
        dim=args.dim,
        is_single_modality=args.is_single_modality,
        has_sparse_vector=args.has_sparse_vector,
        metric_type=args.metric_type,
        index_type=args.index_type,
    )
    
    # 插入数据
    insert_data_to_milvus(
        collection=collection,
        parquet_path=args.parquet_path,
        batch_size=args.batch_size
    )

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```python
def connect_milvus(host: str, port: str, db_name: str):

        description="Unified multimodal retrieval collection (text/image/text+image)",
    )
    
    if has_sparse_vector:
        bm25_func = Function(
            name="text_bm25",
            function_type=FunctionType.BM25,
            input_field_names=["text"],
            output_field_names=["text_sparse_vector"],
        )
        schema.add_function(bm25_func)
    
    return schema

def ensure_collection(
    collection_name: str,
    dim: int = 2048,
    is_single_modality: bool = True,
    has_sparse_vector: bool = True,
    metric_type: str = "IP",
    index_type: str = "HNSW",
) -> Collection:
    """
    确保Collection存在，如果不存在则创建
    """
    # 列出当前数据库中的所有Collection
    collections = utility.list_collections()
    print(f"[INFO] Existing collections: {collections}")
    
    # 检查Collection是否存在
    if utility.has_collection(collection_name):
        print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' already exists, loading...")
        collection = Collection(collection_name)
        try:
            collection.load()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[WARN] Failed to load collection (may already be loaded): {e}")
        return collection
    
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' not found, creating...")
    
    # 创建Schema
    schema = build_schema_with_modality(dim, is_single_modality, has_sparse_vector)
    
    # 创建Collection
    collection = Collection(
        name=collection_name,
        schema=schema,
        shards_num=2,
    )
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' created")
    
    # 创建索引
    print("[INFO] Creating indexes...")
    
    # Dense vector index
    if index_type.upper() == "HNSW":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "HNSW",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"M": 16, "efConstruction": 200},
        }
    elif index_type.upper() == "IVF_FLAT":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "IVF_FLAT",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"nlist": 2048},
        }
    elif index_type.upper() == "IVF_PQ":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "IVF_PQ",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"nlist": 2048, "m": 16, "nbits": 8},
        }
    else:
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "HNSW",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"M": 16, "efConstruction": 200},
        }
    
    if is_single_modality:
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="mm_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Created index for 'mm_embedding': {dense_index_params}")
    else:
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="text_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="image_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Created indexes for text/image embeddings: {dense_index_params}")
    
    # Sparse vector index
    if has_sparse_vector:
        sparse_index_params = {
            "index_type": "SPARSE_INVERTED_INDEX",
            "metric_type": "BM25",
            "params": {"inverted_index_algo": "DAAT_MAXSCORE"},
        }
        collection.create_index("text_sparse_vector", sparse_index_params)
        print(f"[INFO] Created sparse index for 'text_sparse_vector': {sparse_index_params}")
    
    # 加载Collection
    print("[INFO] Loading collection...")
    collection.load()
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' loaded successfully")
    
    return collection

def generate_id(path: str) -> str:
    """根据path生成唯一ID"""
    return hashlib.sha256(path.encode()).hexdigest()[:64]

def extract_doc_id(path: str) -> str:
    """从path提取doc_id"""
    filename = path.split('/')[-1]
    doc_id = filename.rsplit('.', 1)[0] if '.' in filename else filename
    return doc_id[:200]

def prepare_batch_data(df: daft.DataFrame, batch_size: int = 1000):
    """将daft DataFrame转换为Milvus插入格式"""
    # 转换为pandas进行处理
    print("[INFO] Converting daft DataFrame to pandas...")
    pdf = df.to_pandas()
    
    total_rows = len(pdf)
    print(f"[INFO] Total rows to insert: {total_rows}")
    
    for start_idx in range(0, total_rows, batch_size):
        end_idx = min(start_idx + batch_size, total_rows)
        batch_pdf = pdf.iloc[start_idx:end_idx]
        
        batch_data = {
            "id": [],
            "doc_id": [],
            "chunk_idx": [],
            "modality": [],
            "text": [],
            "image_url": [],
            "image_wh": [],
            "time_stamp": [],
            "meta_info": [],
            "mm_embedding": []
        }
        
        current_time = int(time.time() * 1000)
        
        for _, row in batch_pdf.iterrows():
            path = row['path']
            embedding = row['mm_embedding']
            
            # 确保embedding是list类型
            if not isinstance(embedding, list):
                embedding = embedding.tolist() if hasattr(embedding, 'tolist') else list(embedding)
            
            batch_data["id"].append(generate_id(path))
            batch_data["doc_id"].append(extract_doc_id(path))
            batch_data["chunk_idx"].append(0)
            batch_data["modality"].append("image")
            batch_data["text"].append("")  # 图片模态text为空字符串
            batch_data["image_url"].append(path)
            batch_data["image_wh"].append(None)
            batch_data["time_stamp"].append(current_time)
            batch_data["meta_info"].append({"source": "parquet_import", "original_path": path})
            batch_data["mm_embedding"].append(embedding)
        
        yield batch_data, start_idx, end_idx

def insert_data_to_milvus(
    collection: Collection,
    parquet_path: str,
    batch_size: int = 1000
):
    """从parquet文件读取数据并插入Milvus"""
    print(f"[INFO] Reading parquet file: {parquet_path}")
    df = daft.read_parquet(parquet_path)
    
    print("[INFO] Parquet schema:")
    print(df.schema())
    
    print("[INFO] First row preview:")
    df.show(1)
    
    total_inserted = 0
    batch_count = 0
    
    for batch_data, start_idx, end_idx in prepare_batch_data(df, batch_size):
        try:
            collection.insert(batch_data)
            batch_count += 1
            total_inserted += (end_idx - start_idx)
            print(f"[INFO] Inserted batch {batch_count}: rows {start_idx}-{end_idx}, total: {total_inserted}")
            
            # 每10批flush一次
            if batch_count % 10 == 0:
                collection.flush()
                print(f"[INFO] Flushed after {batch_count} batches")
                
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[ERROR] Failed to insert batch {start_idx}-{end_idx}: {e}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            raise
    
    # 最终flush
    print("[INFO] Final flush...")
    collection.flush()
    
    print(f"[DONE] Successfully inserted {total_inserted} records")
    print(f"[INFO] Collection entity count: {collection.num_entities}")

def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Insert parquet data into Milvus")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default="127.0.0.1", help="Milvus host")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=str, default="19530", help="Milvus port")
    parser.add_argument("--db_name", type=str, required=True, help="Database name")
    parser.add_argument("--collection_name", type=str, required=True, help="Collection name")
    parser.add_argument("--parquet_path", type=str, required=True, help="Path to parquet file")
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=1000, help="Batch size for insertion")
    
    # Collection创建参数（如果Collection不存在）
    parser.add_argument("--dim", type=int, default=2048, help="Embedding dimension")
    parser.add_argument("--is_single_modality", action="store_true", default=True,
                        help="Use single modality schema")
    parser.add_argument("--has_sparse_vector", action="store_true", default=True,
                        help="Enable BM25 sparse vector")
    parser.add_argument("--metric_type", type=str, default="IP", 
                        choices=["IP", "L2", "COSINE"], help="Metric type for ANN index")
    parser.add_argument("--index_type", type=str, default="HNSW", 
                        help="Index type (HNSW/IVF_FLAT/IVF_PQ)")
    
    return parser.parse_args()

def main():
    args = parse_args()
    
    print("="*60)
    print("Milvus Data Import Tool")
    print("="*60)
    print(f"Host: {args.host}:{args.port}")
    print(f"Database: {args.db_name}")
    print(f"Collection: {args.collection_name}")
    print(f"Parquet: {args.parquet_path}")
    print(f"Batch size: {args.batch_size}")
    print("="*60)
    
    # 连接Milvus并确保数据库存在
    connect_milvus(args.host, args.port, args.db_name)
    
    # 确保Collection存在（不存在则创建）
    collection = ensure_collection(
        collection_name=args.collection_name,
        dim=args.dim,
        is_single_modality=args.is_single_modality,
        has_sparse_vector=args.has_sparse_vector,
        metric_type=args.metric_type,
        index_type=args.index_type,
    )
    
    # 插入数据
    insert_data_to_milvus(
        collection=collection,
        parquet_path=args.parquet_path,
        batch_size=args.batch_size
    )
    
    print("="*60)
    print("Import completed successfully!")
    print("="*60)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

    FieldSchema,
    CollectionSchema,
    DataType,
    Function,
    FunctionType,
)

def connect_milvus(host: str, port: str, db_name: str):
    """连接Milvus并切换到指定数据库"""
    print(f"[INFO] Connecting to Milvus: {host}:{port}")
    connections.connect(alias="default", host=host, port=port)
    
    # 先列出所有数据库
    db_list = db.list_database()
    print(f"[INFO] Existing databases: {db_list}")
    
    # 如果数据库不存在，先创建
    if db_name not in db_list:
        print(f"[INFO] Database '{db_name}' not found, creating...")
        db.create_database(db_name)
        print(f"[INFO] Database '{db_name}' created successfully")
    else:
        print(f"[INFO] Database '{db_name}' already exists")
    
    # 切换到目标数据库
    print(f"[INFO] Using database: {db_name}")
    db.using_database(db_name)

def build_schema_with_modality(dim: int, is_single_modality: bool=True, has_sparse_vector: bool=True) -> CollectionSchema:
    """构建Schema"""
    fields = [

            dtype=DataType.VARCHAR,

        ),

            max_length=20,

        ),
        FieldSchema(

        ),
        FieldSchema(

        ),

        FieldSchema(

        ),
        FieldSchema(

        ),
    ]
    
    if is_single_modality:
        fields.append(

                dtype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR,
                dim=dim,

                is_nullable=True
            )
        )
    else:
        fields.append(

                name="text_embedding",

            )
        )
        fields.append(

            )

    schema = CollectionSchema(

        enable_dynamic_field=True,

    if has_sparse_vector:
        bm25_func = Function(
            name="text_bm25",

            input_field_names=["text"],
            output_field_names=["text_sparse_vector"],
        )
        schema.add_function(bm25_func)
    
    return schema

def ensure_collection(
    collection_name: str,
    dim: int = 2048,
    is_single_modality: bool = True,
    has_sparse_vector: bool = True,
    metric_type: str = "IP",
    index_type: str = "HNSW",
) -> Collection:
    """确保Collection存在，如果不存在则创建"""
    collections = utility.list_collections()
    print(f"[INFO] Existing collections: {collections}")
    
    if utility.has_collection(collection_name):
        print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' already exists, loading...")
        collection = Collection(collection_name)
        try:
            collection.load()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[WARN] Failed to load collection (may already be loaded): {e}")
        return collection
    
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' not found, creating...")
    
    schema = build_schema_with_modality(dim, is_single_modality, has_sparse_vector)
    collection = Collection(
        name=collection_name,
        schema=schema,
        shards_num=2,
    )
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' created")
    
    print("[INFO] Creating indexes...")
    
    if index_type.upper() == "HNSW":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "HNSW",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"M": 16, "efConstruction": 200},
        }
    elif index_type.upper() == "IVF_FLAT":
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "IVF_FLAT",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"nlist": 2048},
        }
    else:
        dense_index_params = {
            "index_type": "HNSW",
            "metric_type": metric_type,
            "params": {"M": 16, "efConstruction": 200},
        }
    
    if is_single_modality:
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="mm_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Created index for 'mm_embedding'")
    else:
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="text_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        collection.create_index(
            field_name="image_embedding",
            index_params=dense_index_params,
        )
        print(f"[INFO] Created indexes for text/image embeddings")
    
    if has_sparse_vector:
        sparse_index_params = {
            "index_type": "SPARSE_INVERTED_INDEX",
            "metric_type": "BM25",
            "params": {"inverted_index_algo": "DAAT_MAXSCORE"},
        }
        collection.create_index("text_sparse_vector", sparse_index_params)
        print(f"[INFO] Created sparse index")
    
    print("[INFO] Loading collection...")
    collection.load()
    print(f"[INFO] Collection '{collection_name}' loaded successfully")
    
    return collection

def generate_id(path: str) -> str:
    """根据path生成唯一ID"""
    return hashlib.sha256(path.encode()).hexdigest()[:64]

def extract_doc_id(path: str) -> str:
    """从path提取doc_id"""
    filename = path.split('/')[-1]
    doc_id = filename.rsplit('.', 1)[0] if '.' in filename else filename
    return doc_id[:200]

def prepare_batch_data_rowbased(df: daft.DataFrame, batch_size: int = 1000):
    """
    将daft DataFrame转换为Milvus插入格式（行式）
    返回格式：[{field1: value1, field2: value2}, ...]
    """
    print("[INFO] Converting daft DataFrame to pandas...")
    pdf = df.to_pandas()
    
    total_rows = len(pdf)
    print(f"[INFO] Total rows to insert: {total_rows}")
    
    current_time = int(time.time() * 1000)
    
    for start_idx in range(0, total_rows, batch_size):
        end_idx = min(start_idx + batch_size, total_rows)
        batch_pdf = pdf.iloc[start_idx:end_idx]
        
        # 使用行式格式：列表的字典
        batch_data = []
        
        for _, row in batch_pdf.iterrows():
            path = row['path']
            embedding = row['mm_embedding']
            
            # 确保embedding是list类型
            if not isinstance(embedding, list):
                embedding = embedding.tolist() if hasattr(embedding, 'tolist') else list(embedding)
            
            # 每一行是一个字典
            entity = {
                "id": generate_id(path),
                "doc_id": extract_doc_id(path),
                "chunk_idx": 0,
                "modality": "image",
                "text": "",  # 空字符串，BM25会自动处理
                "image_url": path,
                "image_wh": None,
                "time_stamp": current_time,
                "meta_info": {"source": "parquet_import", "original_path": path},
                "mm_embedding": embedding
            }
            batch_data.append(entity)
        
        yield batch_data, start_idx, end_idx

def insert_data_to_milvus(
    collection: Collection,
    parquet_path: str,
    batch_size: int = 1000
):
    """从parquet文件读取数据并插入Milvus"""
    print(f"[INFO] Reading parquet file: {parquet_path}")
    df = daft.read_parquet(parquet_path)
    
    print("[INFO] Parquet schema:")
    print(df.schema())
    
    print("[INFO] First row preview:")
    df.show(1)
    
    total_inserted = 0
    batch_count = 0
    
    for batch_data, start_idx, end_idx in prepare_batch_data_rowbased(df, batch_size):
        try:
            # 打印第一批的数据结构用于调试
            if batch_count == 0:
                print(f"[DEBUG] First batch sample (first record):")
                print(f"  Type: {type(batch_data)}")
                print(f"  Length: {len(batch_data)}")
                if len(batch_data) > 0:
                    print(f"  First record type: {type(batch_data[0])}")
                    print(f"  First record keys: {batch_data[0].keys()}")
                    print(f"  id type: {type(batch_data[0]['id'])}")
                    print(f"  id value: {batch_data[0]['id'][:50]}...")
                    print(f"  embedding type: {type(batch_data[0]['mm_embedding'])}")
                    print(f"  embedding length: {len(batch_data[0]['mm_embedding'])}")
            
            # 插入数据
            collection.insert(batch_data)
            batch_count += 1
            total_inserted += (end_idx - start_idx)
            print(f"[INFO] Inserted batch {batch_count}: rows {start_idx}-{end_idx}, total: {total_inserted}")
            
            # 每10批flush一次
            if batch_count % 10 == 0:
                collection.flush()
                print(f"[INFO] Flushed after {batch_count} batches")
                
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[ERROR] Failed to insert batch {start_idx}-{end_idx}: {e}")
            print(f"[DEBUG] Problematic batch info:")
            print(f"  Batch size: {len(batch_data)}")
            if len(batch_data) > 0:
                print(f"  Sample record: {batch_data[0]}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            raise
    
    # 最终flush
    print("[INFO] Final flush...")
    collection.flush()
    
    print(f"[DONE] Successfully inserted {total_inserted} records")
    print(f"[INFO] Collection entity count: {collection.num_entities}")

def parse_args():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Insert parquet data into Milvus")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default="127.0.0.1", help="Milvus host")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=str, default="19530", help="Milvus port")
    parser.add_argument("--db_name", type=str, required=True, help="Database name")
    parser.add_argument("--collection_name", type=str, required=True, help="Collection name")
    parser.add_argument("--parquet_path", type=str, required=True, help="Path to parquet file")
    parser.add_argument("--batch_size", type=int, default=50, help="Batch size for insertion")
    
    # Collection创建参数
    parser.add_argument("--dim", type=int, default=2048, help="Embedding dimension")
    parser.add_argument("--is_single_modality", action="store_true", default=True,
                        help="Use single modality schema")
    parser.add_argument("--has_sparse_vector", action="store_true", default=True,
                        help="Enable BM25 sparse vector")
    parser.add_argument("--metric_type", type=str, default="IP", 
                        choices=["IP", "L2", "COSINE"], help="Metric type for ANN index")
    parser.add_argument("--index_type", type=str, default="HNSW", 
                        help="Index type (HNSW/IVF_FLAT)")
    
    return parser.parse_args()

def main():
    args = parse_args()
    
    print("="*60)
    print("Milvus Data Import Tool")
    print("="*60)
    print(f"Host: {args.host}:{args.port}")
    print(f"Database: {args.db_name}")
    print(f"Collection: {args.collection_name}")
    print(f"Parquet: {args.parquet_path}")
    print(f"Batch size: {args.batch_size}")
    print("="*60)
    
    # 连接Milvus并确保数据库存在
    connect_milvus(args.host, args.port, args.db_name)
    
    # 确保Collection存在
    collection = ensure_collection(
        collection_name=args.collection_name,
        dim=args.dim,
        is_single_modality=args.is_single_modality,
        has_sparse_vector=args.has_sparse_vector,
        metric_type=args.metric_type,
        index_type=args.index_type,
    )
    
    # 插入数据
    insert_data_to_milvus(
        collection=collection,
        parquet_path=args.parquet_path,
        batch_size=args.batch_size
    )
    
    print("="*60)
    print("Import completed successfully!")
    print("="*60)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

   ```python
   {"id": ["1", "2"], "name": ["a", "b"]}
   ```
